steps.title: Interpret the equation as breaking down the total salsa
steps.content: The equation $5x + 8y = 40$ represents how 40 cups of salsa are distributed. Since $x$ is the number of small jars and $y$ is the number of large jars, the terms $5x$ and $8y$ must each represent amounts of salsa in cups, not jar counts.

steps.title: Decode what each coefficient represents
steps.content:
In $5x$: the coefficient 5 represents cups per small jar.

Multiplying by $x$ (the number of small jars) gives the total cups in small jars.

In $8y$: the coefficient 8 represents cups per large jar.

Multiplying by $y$ (the number of large jars) gives the total cups in large jars.

steps.title: Identify what 8y represents
steps.content: $8y$ represents (8 cups per large jar) times (the number of large jars), which is the total cups of salsa in the large jars. That matches the correct answer - C is correct.
